Recommendations.Name: Error
Recommendations.Rationale: If Mappings contains invalid entries (non-object, missing Address), the task silently skips them. An Error event output would let flows handle bad data explicitly.

Recommendations.Name: UseRegex
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently uses string split/join. A UseRegex flag would enable regex-based search/replace, vastly increasing utility.

Recommendations.Name: CaseSensitive
Recommendations.Rationale: No way to do case-insensitive replacements without regex.

Recommendations.Name: ReplacementCount
Recommendations.Rationale: The count is already computed internally but discarded. Exposing it as an output enables conditional branching (e.g., 'if no replacements were made').

Recommendations.Name: Separator
Recommendations.Rationale: AppendNewline is a special case. A general Separator setting (default: empty) would let you join with commas, semicolons, custom delimiters, etc. AppendNewline becomes Separator='\n'.

Recommendations.Name: Error
Recommendations.Rationale: Template parsing failures are caught silently and fall back to the raw template. An Error output would let flows detect bad templates.

Recommendations.Name: Error
Recommendations.Rationale: Expression errors currently fire Complete with an empty string. An Error event would let flows branch on bad expressions rather than silently propagating empty values.

Recommendations.Name: QuoteCharacter
Recommendations.Rationale: CSV fields containing the delimiter must be quoted. The parser currently has no quote handling, so fields like '"Smith, John"' would be split incorrectly.

Recommendations.Name: TrimFields
Recommendations.Rationale: Fields are trimmed implicitly. A setting to control this is useful for whitespace-sensitive data.

Recommendations.Name: SkipEmptyLines
Recommendations.Rationale: Empty lines are already filtered, but this should be an explicit setting.

Recommendations.Name: ColumnCount
Recommendations.Rationale: Useful for validation — knowing how many columns were found.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: Expose the parsed header names so downstream tasks can reference them.

Recommendations.Name: FieldMapping
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently a pass-through with no transformation logic. A FieldMapping (JSON: [{From, To, Template}]) would make this card actually do something.

Recommendations.Name: FilterExpression
Recommendations.Rationale: Filter rows by an expression, e.g. 'Amount > 100'.

Recommendations.Name: OutputFields
Recommendations.Rationale: JSON array of field names to include in output (column projection).
This card is currently a no-op stub. The Execute function just passes records through unchanged. Needs actual transformation logic.

Recommendations.Name: JoinType
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently only does inner intersection. A JoinType setting ('inner', 'left', 'right', 'full') would add SQL-style join semantics.

Recommendations.Name: MatchCount
Recommendations.Rationale: How many matches were found — useful for validation.
The Bins setting is defined but never used in the execution logic. Currently just counts unique values — does not create numeric bin ranges.

Recommendations.Name: SortBy
Recommendations.Rationale: Sort frequency results by 'count' (descending) or 'key' (alphabetical).

Recommendations.Name: SkipEmpty
Recommendations.Rationale: When splitting by newline, trailing newlines produce empty tokens that trigger needless iterations. A SkipEmpty flag would filter them out.

Recommendations.Name: TrimTokens
Recommendations.Rationale: Whitespace around tokens (especially from CSV or multiline text) causes subtle bugs. A TrimTokens option would strip leading/trailing whitespace from each token.

Recommendations.Name: TimeoutMs
Recommendations.Rationale: Child operations can run indefinitely. A timeout prevents runaway sub-flows from hanging the parent.

Recommendations.Name: InheritGlobalState
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently always copies GlobalState into the child. A flag to disable this would enable fully isolated sub-operations.

Recommendations.Name: MaxBytes
Recommendations.Rationale: No size guard. Reading a multi-GB file will crash the process. A MaxBytes limit (default: 50MB) would prevent accidental OOM.

Recommendations.Name: FileName
Recommendations.Rationale: write-file outputs FileName, FileLocation, and FilePath. read-file should too, for symmetry and downstream use.

Recommendations.Name: Append
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently always overwrites. An Append mode would enable log-file-style accumulation without needing string-appender + write-file chains.

Recommendations.Name: LineEnding
Recommendations.Rationale: No control over line endings (lf vs crlf). Important for cross-platform file generation.
Setting is named 'File' but read-file and write-file use 'FilePath'. Should be consistent across the file-io category.

Recommendations.Name: PrettyFormat
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently always pretty-prints with tabs. A PrettyFormat=false option would output minified JSON for smaller files.

Recommendations.Name: IndentType
Recommendations.Rationale: Hardcoded to tab indentation. Should support 'tab' or 'spaces' to match project conventions.

Recommendations.Name: IndentCount
Recommendations.Rationale: When IndentType is 'spaces', how many? Common values: 2 or 4.

Recommendations.Name: SortKeys
Recommendations.Rationale: Alphabetically sort object keys in output. Useful for deterministic/diff-friendly JSON.
Setting is named 'File' (not 'FilePath') and 'Address' (not 'DataAddress'). Inconsistent with other file-io and meadow cards.
Event output is 'Done' but most cards use 'Complete' or 'WriteComplete'. Inconsistent.

Recommendations.Name: Recursive
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently only lists the immediate directory. Recursive listing is a common need for tree-walking workflows.

Recommendations.Name: IncludeDirectories
Recommendations.Rationale: readdirSync returns both files and directories. A flag to control whether dirs appear in the output.

Recommendations.Name: FileCount
Recommendations.Rationale: Expose the count as a typed output for easy conditional branching.

Recommendations.Name: Overwrite
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently always overwrites. A guard against accidental overwrites of important files.

Recommendations.Name: BytesCopied
Recommendations.Rationale: write-file and read-file report byte counts. copy-file should too.
Event output is 'Done' — inconsistent with write-file's 'WriteComplete'.

Recommendations.Name: TimeoutMs
Recommendations.Rationale: No request timeout. A hung remote server blocks the flow indefinitely.

Recommendations.Name: StatusCode
Recommendations.Rationale: The HTTP status code is available but not exposed. Needed for conditional logic on 404s, 401s, etc.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: get-json has Headers but get-text does not. This is a clear omission — many text endpoints require auth headers or Accept headers.

Recommendations.Name: TimeoutMs
Recommendations.Rationale: Same as get-json — no timeout guard.

Recommendations.Name: StatusCode
Recommendations.Rationale: Same as get-json.

Recommendations.Name: TimeoutMs
Recommendations.Rationale: No request timeout.

Recommendations.Name: StatusCode
Recommendations.Rationale: HTTP status code not exposed.
Uses 'Address' for the data source but meadow cards use 'DataAddress'. Should be consistent.

Recommendations.Name: TimeoutMs
Recommendations.Rationale: The most configurable HTTP card and it still has no timeout setting.

Recommendations.Name: RetryDelayMs
Recommendations.Rationale: Retries setting exists but no delay between retries. Without delay, retries against rate-limited APIs will all fail.

Recommendations.Name: StatusCode
Recommendations.Rationale: The response object is available but the status code isn't broken out as a discrete output.

Recommendations.Name: ResponseHeaders
Recommendations.Rationale: Response headers (especially pagination, rate-limit, location) are not exposed.
Retries setting is defined but the Execute function never implements retry logic. It makes a single request.

Recommendations.Name: WorkingDirectory
Recommendations.Rationale: Currently uses StagingPath or cwd. A WorkingDirectory override would let commands run in arbitrary locations.

Recommendations.Name: TimeoutMs
Recommendations.Rationale: Hardcoded to 300000ms (5 min). Should be configurable per command — some are quick, some are long.

Recommendations.Name: Environment
Recommendations.Rationale: JSON object of environment variables to set. Needed for passing API keys, config paths, etc.

Recommendations.Name: StdErr
Recommendations.Rationale: StdErr is currently concatenated into StdOut on error. It should be a separate output for proper error handling.

Recommendations.Name: Level
Recommendations.Rationale: Always logs as error. A Level setting ('error', 'warning', 'info', 'debug') would make this a general-purpose logging card.

Recommendations.Name: InputType
Recommendations.Rationale: Support 'text', 'number', 'boolean', 'select' to provide appropriate UI input controls.

Recommendations.Name: DefaultValue
Recommendations.Rationale: Pre-fill the input field so users can just confirm common values.

Recommendations.Name: Options
Recommendations.Rationale: JSON array of allowed values when InputType is 'select'. Renders as a dropdown.

Recommendations.Name: Cancelled
Recommendations.Rationale: No way for the user to cancel/abort the input. A Cancel event output would let flows handle user abandonment.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: No way to send auth tokens or custom headers to the Meadow API.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: No auth header support.

Recommendations.Name: PageSize
Recommendations.Rationale: Hardcoded to 100 records. Should be configurable.

Recommendations.Name: PageNumber
Recommendations.Rationale: Always fetches page 0. Can't paginate through large datasets.

Recommendations.Name: RecordCount
Recommendations.Rationale: Expose the count for downstream branching (e.g., 'if no records found').

Recommendations.Name: Destination
Recommendations.Rationale: No way to write the created record to a state address. Every other card that returns data has a Destination setting. This is a clear omission.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: No auth header support.

Recommendations.Name: Destination
Recommendations.Rationale: Same as meadow-create: no way to store the updated record to a state address.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: No auth header support.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: No auth header support.
Event output is 'Done' while most meadow cards use 'Complete'.

Recommendations.Name: Filter
Recommendations.Rationale: meadow-reads has a Filter setting but meadow-count does not. You can't count a filtered subset, only the total. This defeats the purpose for most use cases.

Recommendations.Name: Headers
Recommendations.Rationale: No auth header support.

Recommendations.Name: TotalTokens
Recommendations.Rationale: Convenience output: PromptTokens + CompletionTokens. Useful for cost tracking without needing an expression-solver.

Recommendations.Name: Dimensions
Recommendations.Rationale: Some embedding models (e.g., text-embedding-3-small) support dimension reduction. A Dimensions setting lets users choose the vector size.

Recommendations.Name: Destination
Recommendations.Rationale: No way to write results to a state address. Every other I/O card has this.

Recommendations.Name: Destination
Recommendations.Rationale: No Destination setting to write content to a state address. Must use the Content output port and wire it manually.

Recommendations.Name: Pattern
Recommendations.Rationale: Local list-files has a Pattern setting for glob filtering. The content-system equivalent should too.

Recommendations.Name: Recursive
Recommendations.Rationale: No way to list files recursively through subdirectories.

CrossCuttingIssues.Details: Success events vary wildly: 'Complete', 'Done', 'ReadComplete', 'WriteComplete', 'ReplaceComplete', 'ValueInputComplete', 'Completed'. Input events vary too: 'Trigger', 'In', 'Execute', 'BeginRead', 'BeginWrite', 'Replace', 'Append', 'RequestInput', 'Evaluate', 'Launch'. Consider standardizing on 'Trigger'/'Complete'/'Error' for consistency, or at least within each category.

CrossCuttingIssues.Issue: Inconsistent Setting Names for Same Concept
CrossCuttingIssues.Details: File path setting is named 'FilePath' (read-file, write-file, content-*), 'File' (read-json, write-json), 'Folder' (list-files), or 'Source'/'TargetFile' (copy-file). Data source is 'Address' (send-json, write-json), 'DataAddress' (meadow-create/update, if-conditional), 'SourceAddress' (parse-csv, csv-transform, histogram), or 'InputAddress' (llm-*). These should converge.

CrossCuttingIssues.Issue: Missing Destination Setting on Several Cards
CrossCuttingIssues.Details: meadow-create, meadow-update, beacon-dispatch, and all content-system cards lack a 'Destination' setting to write outputs to a state address. This forces downstream tasks to use template expressions to read from TaskOutput, rather than having a clean state-address write.
None of the 4 HTTP client cards expose the response status code. This makes it impossible to branch on 404 vs 500 vs 200 without inspecting the response body.

CrossCuttingIssues.Issue: No Timeout Settings on HTTP Cards
CrossCuttingIssues.Details: get-json, get-text, send-json, and rest-request have no TimeoutMs setting. A hung remote server blocks the entire flow.
None of the 6 meadow cards accept a Headers setting. Authenticated Meadow APIs are unusable from flows.
The Retries setting is defined and accepted but the Execute function makes exactly one request. Dead code.
The Execute function passes records through unchanged. The card exists in the palette but does nothing.
The Bins setting is defined but the Execute function ignores it. It only does frequency counting, not binned histograms.

HighPriority: write-json: Add PrettyFormat, IndentType, IndentCount settings (hardcoded to tab, no config)
get-text: Add Headers setting (get-json has it, get-text doesn't)
meadow-create: Add Destination setting (can't store created record to state)
meadow-update: Add Destination setting (can't store updated record to state)
meadow-count: Add Filter setting (can only count ALL records, not filtered subsets)
All HTTP cards: Add TimeoutMs setting (hung servers block flows)
All HTTP cards: Add StatusCode output (can't branch on HTTP status)
All Meadow cards: Add Headers setting (can't auth to Meadow APIs)
